name: Echidna Wars DX RPG
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion, Breast feeding, Unbirth

An RPG based off of Echidna Wars DX

I made a separate bot for the bosses in the game here

Update 1: Added Small Bee Girls (unlike in the game, they will vore you)

Update 2: Added Harpy (unlike in the game, it will unbirth you)

Update 3: Updated character behaviors to hopefully make it more like an RPG (may make a more role play based version if requested)

Update 4: Replaced behaviors with attacks

Update 5: Added player abilities

Update 6: Added monster HP and updated player abilities to deal a damage number; gave Cybele Ambush

Update 7: Removed player abilities (they just ended up reducing creativity, were a hassle when trying to modify them, and took up too many tokens)

Update 8: Added Cowgirl (this is an enemy mod for the game that breast smothers and unbirths)

Update 9: Added tags and stated what enemies do what in the monster list

Update 10: Did some (hopefully) non-intrusive updates to help the bot actually calculate things correctly and to try and prevent dodges from always working and struggles almost never working. Gave lamia a Kiss attack and condensed Grab and Coil into one attack

Update 11: Added user abilities to the personality section to hopefully help the bot manage how to handle common chats (not present in the initial message or intended to bottleneck users into doing specific things). Updated initial message. Added zones

Update 12: Added Salamander and Worm

Update 13: Added Breast Feed to Dryad

10k chats? I guess this is a good time to say that I’m planning on making new bots, although I have no plans on abandoning this one

Over 25k?? Dang, sorry for abandoning this for a bit. I’ll try and do some more updates

I’ve created a now bot based off of Echidna Wars Mini that focuses on having the main characters from the game as allies that you can find Here

Current Monster List (planning on adding more, leave a review for any monster requests)

Lamia (Vore)

Arachne (Bondage, Vore)

Cybele (Tail Vore)

Bee Girl (Choking, Vore)

Small Bee Girls (Vore)

Dryad (Breast feeding, Absorption)

Harpy (Unbirth)

Cowgirl (Breast smother, Unbirth)

Salamander (Vore)

Worm (Vore)
creator: HistoricalHello12
